nasb.text: it is a chronic leprosy on the skin of his body, and the priest shall pronounce him unclean; he shall not isolate him, for he is unclean.

esv.text: it is a chronic leprous disease in the skin of his body, and the priest shall pronounce him unclean. He shall not shut him up, for he is unclean.

cnv.text: 這就是皮肉上的潛伏性痲風病發作，祭司要宣布他為不潔淨；不必隔離觀察，因為他已經不潔淨。

ccb.text: 他就是患了慢性麻风病，祭司要宣布他是不洁净的。他无须被隔离，因他已经不洁净。
